name: Riley Torres
bio: Fast plans, loud nights, zero overthinking.

dealbreakers.text: Too much depth too early, too much reassurance, and too much planning all make me pull away.

friendship_preferences.text: I like funny, spontaneous, easygoing people who can keep up.

relationship_preferences.text: I want something playful, low-pressure, and exciting more than serious right away.

communication_style.text: Fast banter is my thing. If a chat gets too reflective too quickly, I lose interest.

values.text: Fun, novelty, freedom, and momentum matter most to me right now.

lifestyle.text: I like nightlife, spontaneous plans, loud rooms, and saying yes without thinking too hard.
